authorized_by: Licensed HYROX affiliate gym & trainer (identity held privately by the operator; verifiable on request)
permitted_uses: Nominative use of the HYROX name to describe the race format
Display of the HYROX wordmark on this pack and its skills
Use of the display name "HYROX Performance Pack"
notes: The HYROX mark is used under the operator's HYROX affiliate license, effective September 2025. The licensed affiliate's legal identity is held PRIVATELY by the operator (recorded in assets/brand/brand-authorization.private.json, which is gitignored and never published) and is verifiable on request; HYROX World GmbH may contact the operator to confirm. HYROX is a trademark of HYROX World GmbH. This pack is independently produced by the affiliate operator and is not separately reviewed, certified, or endorsed by HYROX World GmbH — an affiliate license to use the mark is not an endorsement of this software. The HYROX logo asset in assets/brand/hyrox-logo.svg was supplied by the operator from their affiliate kit (not scraped). If the license lapses or is not verified, set authorized back to false and re-run `npm run build` to revert to the neutral display name.
